title: Honors & Awards 🎉
text:

Travel Awards 🥳

International Society for Bayesian Analysis (ISBA) Travel Award:

Award to attend BayesComp 2025, Singapore, June 2025

Grant to attend the ASC & OZCOTS conferences, Wollongong, Australia, December 2023
